ai_summary: **Executive Summary:**  Maharashtra Seamless Limited announced that Mr. Pithelis Raj Santhanamarian has resigned from his Whole-time Director position, effective June 30, 2026, citing personal reasons and other pre-occupations. While this impacts executive leadership, he will continue as a Non-executive Director, retaining board presence and mitigating the complete loss of his expertise. This transition suggests a strategic re-alignment of his role, with no apparent material red flags beyond the standard generic reason for resignation.
